qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_consumo as oi_consumo, t0.c_consumo as c_consumo, t0.d_consumo as d_consumo, SEC.policy, t0.c_consumo as CODE, t0.d_consumo as TEXT FROM LIQ08_CONSUMOS as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.Consumos.CONSUMO\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_consumo LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_consumo asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_consumo as oi_consumo, t0.c_consumo as c_consumo, t0.d_consumo as d_consumo, SEC.policy, t0.c_consumo as CODE, t0.d_consumo as TEXT FROM LIQ08_CONSUMOS as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.Consumos.CONSUMO\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_consumo LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_consumo asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('SELECT LIQ08_TIPO_CONSUMO.oi_tipo_consumo as ID, LIQ08_TIPO_CONSUMO.c_tipo_consumo as COD, LIQ08_TIPO_CONSUMO.d_tipo_consumo as DES, LIQ08_TIPO_CONSUMO.c_tipo_consumo as c_tipo_consumo, LIQ08_TIPO_CONSUMO.d_tipo_consumo as d_tipo_consumo FROM LIQ08_TIPO_CONSUMO WHERE LIQ08_TIPO_CONSUMO.oi_tipo_consumo in ({%=$PARAM/@IDS %})')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: IDS
NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.Tipo_Consumo.TIPO_CONSUMO.QUERY
